allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('Real_World_Classification.ipynb',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(f'=== Cell {i} \({c[\\"cell_type\\"]}\) ===\\n' + ''.join\(c['source']\)[:2000] + '\\n'\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")
